backend_tests.description: Verify that a valid JWT token allows access to protected RESTful endpoints[cite: 11, 12].
Verify that a ticket is successfully saved to MongoDB with all mandatory L1 fields[cite: 10, 16, 21].
Ensure an L3 user can only fetch tickets with Critical Values C1 or C2[cite: 34].
Verify that every status change creates a corresponding entry in the ticket log[cite: 31, 48].

frontend_tests.description: Test that the form validates required fields (Title, Priority) before submission[cite: 7, 17, 21].
Verify that the 'Assign Critical Value' UI element is only visible to users with the L2 role[cite: 26, 43].
Ensure the ticket list correctly filters by 'Priority' when the user selects a filter option[cite: 4, 44].
Verify that the 'Escalate' function captures and displays accompanying notes in the detail view[cite: 45, 46].
